inputs.prompt: Interior shot of a cluttered, dimly lit detective's office. Sunlight (or moonlight) filtering through dusty window blinds creating strong horizontal shadow patterns (chiaroscuro). Thick cigarette smoke swirling in the air. Retro-futuristic computers with glowing CRT monitors. A lone character in a trench coat looking out the window. Cinematic atmosphere, melancholic mood, grainy film texture.
